routingMode.label: Routing Mode
routingMode.help: Choose auto, subscription, or paygo routing.

catalogSource.label: Catalog Source
catalogSource.help: Choose how NanoGPT model discovery should work.

requestApi.label: Request API
requestApi.help: Choose OpenAI chat completions or OpenAI responses transport.

provider.label: Provider Override
provider.help: Optional NanoGPT upstream provider id for paygo provider selection.

enableWebSearchProvider.label: Enable Web Search Provider
enableWebSearchProvider.help: Register NanoGPT's direct web_search provider even when routing is not explicitly paygo.

enableWebFetchFallbackStrip.label: Enable web_fetch Fallback Strip
enableWebFetchFallbackStrip.help: When true (default), non-MiniMax families strip web_fetch and use curl fallback hints.

enableWebFetchToolNameRewrite.label: Enable web_fetch Tool Name Rewrite
enableWebFetchToolNameRewrite.help: When true, rewrites web_fetch tool names to openclaw_web_fetch and forces fallback stripping off.

bridgeMode.label: Bridge Mode
bridgeMode.help: Enable the NanoProxy-style bridge for tool-enabled completions requests.

bridgeProtocol.label: Bridge Protocol
bridgeProtocol.help: Choose the structured bridge protocol to request from NanoGPT.

responseFormat.label: Response Format
responseFormat.help: Optionally inject OpenAI-compatible response_format into NanoGPT requests.
